_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1-dependent tumors require a microenvironment containing Nf1+/-- and c-kit-dependent bone marrow.

_contextSnippet: To identify donor cells and their progeny within the recipients, the Nf1+/− and WT donors were inter-crossed with a transgenic mouse that expresses EGFP in all bone marrow cells
details: Successfully used to identify donor cells and their progeny within recipients through EGFP expression in all bone marrow cells
